refined_fr.refined_fr: Ensure the teleoperation link availability meets or exceeds the customer-defined target to maintain continuous remote control capability.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad; refining it clarifies the focus on link availability as a measurable performance metric critical for teleoperation effectiveness and safety.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure link uptime and downtime over the evaluation period and compare against the customer-defined availability target.
sub_frs: Detect and recover from link failures promptly
Monitor link quality and report status

candidate_dps: Redundant network link architecture with failover
Real-time link health monitoring and alerting
selected_dp.selected_dp: Redundant network link architecture with failover

coupling_check.notes: The selected DP logically isolates link availability concerns and supports modular implementation with minimal cross-dependencies.

assumptions_risks: Risk of increased system complexity impacting maintainability
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider integrating real-time monitoring DP in next decomposition level to enhance detection and recovery.

im_boundary.name: Teleoperation
im_boundary.scope: Implements teleoperation link availability through network redundancy and failover mechanisms.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Handles physical and logical network connections for teleoperation control data.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Sends link status and health metrics to NGHE Solution and Safety Services.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receives teleoperation commands dependent on link availability.

module_containment_scores.notes: Contains overall system but link availability logic is diffused if placed here.
Vehicle module depends on link but does not own link availability logic.
Best containment of link availability DP with minimal diffusion.
Receives alerts but does not implement link availability.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Placing the DP in Teleoperation module centralizes link availability logic, minimizing diffusion and improving maintainability.
containment_risks: Potential coupling with Vehicle module for physical network interfaces
Dependency on NGHE Solution for overall system coordination
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Review interface definitions with Vehicle module to ensure clear separation of concerns.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP directly addresses the refined FR with clear measurable performance and logical solution.

diffusion_risks: Minor diffusion risk if link monitoring logic is duplicated outside Teleoperation.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Teleoperation module provides strong containment for the DP with well-defined interfaces.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification via telemetry data and network link monitoring is feasible within Teleoperation module.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of responsibility for link availability to Teleoperation module.

recommended_revisions: Clarify interface contracts with Vehicle module for physical network access.
Plan next level decomposition for link monitoring and recovery sub-functions.

decision.justification: While the decomposition is sound, the FR is not yet atomic and further refinement is needed to fully capture detection and recovery aspects.
next_level_sub_frs: Detect and recover from link failures promptly
Monitor link quality and report status

revise.why: To decompose the FR into atomic sub-FRs that can be individually addressed with corresponding DPs and IM assignments.

assumptions: Network infrastructure supports redundancy and failover.
Teleoperation module can implement required link availability mechanisms.
open_risks: Complexity of redundancy may impact maintainability.
Interface clarity with Vehicle module needs confirmation.
evidence_needed: Verification plans for link monitoring and failover.
